title: eutrema heterophyllum
intro: Eutrema heterophyllum, also known as Himalayan pennywort or Indian pennywort, is a plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Eutrema heterophyllum include its potential to help manage diabetes, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Eutrema heterophyllum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
